caption: A man wearing a white short-sleeved shirt is seated inside a vehicle, seen from the side through an open window. He raises his right arm to adjust his sunglasses or touch his forehead, a motion that progresses across the sequence. To his left, another person is partially visible in the vehicle. The scene is overlaid with a news broadcast graphic featuring a red and yellow color scheme. At the top, a headline reads "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". On the left and right sides, vertical panels display portraits of several men with names such as "डिप्टी CM", "सुब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "मंत्री", "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", and "विजय चौधरी". A large, stylized "BREAKING NEWS" banner stretches across the lower middle of the screen, though the letters are partially obscured. The bottom right corner displays the "MAHASODH" logo and a timestamp of "10:07 PM".
